articles.title: 189-square-foot Cape Cod beach cottage lists for $295k
articles.description:
There is also potential to buy three small units in a row.

The post 189-square-foot Cape Cod beach cottage lists for $295k appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 189-square-foot Cape Cod beach cottage is listed for $295,000.
Potential buyers can purchase three additional small units in a row.
This listing may attract Boston residents seeking affordable vacation homes.

articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (June 3)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 83 Summit Road. One-family Cape Cod, built in 1956, 1,584 square feet, 7 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 18,276-square-foot lot. $655,000 590 Adams St. One-family conventional, built in 1890, 825 square feet, 8 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, on 21,326-square-foot lot. $389,000 56 Townsend St. #C21 Condo/Apt, built in 1972, 894 square feet, […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (June 3) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home at 83 Summit Road sold for $655,000 on June 3.
590 Adams St. sold for $389,000; built in 1890 with 2 bedrooms.
Rising home prices indicate a competitive real estate market in Greater Boston.
